chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 5017 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.14358/2016 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 28-01-2021 Mr. Aamir Mustafa Kamario, Associate of Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Mian Abdus Salam Arain, Advocate for respondents No.9 to 21. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After hearing at some length, by consent, this petition is disposed of with the following directions to the learned Trial Court: i) Issues will be framed by the learned Trial Court and if any of the parties have not filed written statement, same should be filed within two weeks from the receipt of this order by the learned Trial Court, whereafter list of witness and documents will be filed by the parties-present petitioner and the Respondents. ii) After framing of issues, evidence will be led by the respective parties. iii) Learned Trial Court will not allow any adjournment when the evidence has commenced, unless there is some exceptional circumstances. If any of the advocate or witness is not present on the date of evidence, then appropriate order shall be passed by the learned Trial Court, including, closing the side or marking the cross-examination as Nil, as the case may be. Page 2 of 2 The suit be decided within three months from today. The impugned order is modified only to the extent of above directions. Office is directed to take immediate steps in view of above order. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
